title: Daemon key exchange protocol (ECDH + hello/hello-ack)
description: After token auth succeeds, implement the key exchange protocol on the daemon side: generate ephemeral X25519 keypair, receive extension's public key, send daemon's public key, derive session key using PSK-authenticated HKDF, decrypt hello message to confirm key agreement, send encrypted hello-ack. On failure, close with code 4001 or 4002.
acceptanceCriteria: After auth, daemon waits for { type: 'key-exchange', publicKey: '<b64>' } from extension
Daemon generates ephemeral X25519 keypair per connection
Daemon sends { type: 'key-exchange', publicKey: '<b64>' } with its public key
Session key derived via PSK-authenticated HKDF-SHA256
Daemon decrypts hello message from extension — GCM auth tag must pass
Key exchange timeout (5s) closes with code 4001
Decryption failure closes with code 4002 (MITM detection)
Ephemeral keys discarded on session close (zeroed from memory)
Session transitions to encrypted state after hello-ack
